perf_hint: two lattice layers over the uniform and no textures, so frame time scales with pixel count alone — on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: speed
params.description: How fast the field flies past when nothing is playing.

params.name: warp
params.description: How far the loudness of the song stretches the stars into warp lines.

params.name: streak
params.description: The base streak length the warp multiplies.

params.name: twinkle
params.description: How hard the air band flickers the stars that are barely moving.

params.name: flash
params.description: How far a hit stretches and brightens every streak.

params.name: tint
params.description: How much of the palette colors the starlight; 0 is plain white stars.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the sky.
